title: Social media addiction lawsuit against Meta is dropped | TechCrunch
summary: The plaintiff’s decision to drop the case follows Meta’s loss in a New Mexico case earlier this year , which marked its first courtroom defeat over social media harms. No matter your goal, Disrupt can empower you.
